evals.prompt: Make a stickman episode about procrastinating on a work deadline. 16:9, ~30s.
evals.expected_output: 01-episode-plan.md with 4-6 beats (16:9, durations 5|10s, total 20-30s). context.md with mode=episode, skip_character=false. state.md with 4 phases, phase 1 done. dashboard.html initialised. art-direction.md and character.md present in artifacts/.

evals.prompt: Just create me a stickman character. No episode yet.
evals.expected_output: context.md with mode=character-only. state.md with phase 2 only. No 01-episode-plan.md written. dashboard.html shows channel section only (no episode section). art-direction.md and character.md present in artifacts/.

evals.prompt: Make a stickman episode about trying to set up a new wifi router.
evals.expected_output: Episode plan for wifi/router scenario (not abstract). If artifacts/character-source.png exists in context, state.md marks phase 2 as skip. art-direction.md and character.md not overwritten if already present.
